programme.title: Hart 220
programme.desc: Hart 220

programme.title: Cagney and Lacey
programme.desc: Mary Beth is the star witness in a trial that turns out not to be the slam dunk the prosecutors thought it was Meanwhile Chris and Mary Beth try to convince a rape witness to not back out of testifying

programme.title: Starsky 208
programme.desc: Starsky 208

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Dominic accepts to deliver 2000000 ransom for two Cuban political prisoners by plane but raiders steal the cash and he must crash-land back on Cuba due to a storm Despite the hurricane Hawke flies to the rescue in Airwolf and helps Dom shake off suspicion by setting things right Archangels seems involved in supplying weapons to the thug militia

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A frustrated dreamer turns to the supernatural to achieve success using an ornate pipe to eliminate anyone who gets in his way

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Sheriff of Tombstone
programme.desc:
Roy Rogers and George Gabby Hayes in Sheriff of Tombstone 1941
The mayor has sent for a gunslinger who though appearing to clean up the town is really to be the mayors means of taking the town over When Roy and Gabby arrive in Tombstone Roy is mistaken for the gunslinger Just as Roy is ready to expose the mayor the real gunslinger shows up

programme.title: Billy the Kid Returns
programme.desc: Rogers plays a lookalike to the dead Billy The Kid and restores the tranquility of Lincoln County after subduing the criminal element

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Addams Family 118
programme.desc: Addams Family 118

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa manages Georges campaign for town councilman

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Little Luke writes an essay revealing a secret about Grampa

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol has sprained her wrist so Wilbur hires Velma a fantastic cook She even serves carrot pizzas to Ed When Velma announces that shes leaving to find a boyfriend Ed calls her on the phone and pretends to be a local secret admirer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: Rifleman 216
programme.desc: Rifleman 216

programme.title: Rifleman 424
programme.desc: Rifleman 424

programme.desc: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bonanza

programme.title: West 302
programme.desc: West 302

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon have less than two hours to find the dog that bit a little girl five days earlier Normally treatment consists of serum injections followed by vaccine inoculations but in this case the girl is highly allergic to the anti-rabies serum and it could kill her

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimbles current boss A warehouse owner with a terminal disease wants to help Dr Kimble by impersonating him leading Lt Gerald to the Country of Greece and dying at sea

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A photographer whos anxious to get her career back on track gets some unexpected help on her latest photo shoots from Freddy whos terrorizing her models Meanwhile three FBI agents come to Springwood to investigate a family homicide but Freddy has some surprises in store for them

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A beautiful waitress marries the owner of a lumber camp and then quickly starts to realize that he is not what she really wants

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A con artist meets and weds a wealthy old widows through a dating service then murders them and takes the inheritance finally gets the date of his dreams - the very worst of them

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: An emotionally unstable woman becomes obsessed with the idea that her husband is having an affair

programme.title: Hitchhiker 511
programme.desc: Young man on the brink of success is about to marry the woman of his dreams However his past comes calling

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A scientist whos working on establishing contact with alien life finds his project in jeopardy when his loan shark comes to call Meanwhile another scientist is researching the communicative skills of an intelligent chimp but her arrogant boss seems to have more of an interest in torturing the animal than performing legitimate experiments

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A smooth-talking criminal comes to the island and holds the women on the island hostage in exchange for ransom money but when he is captured they decide to try and reform him instead of holding him prisoner

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: The stakes escalate as Flora Kate and Hassie refuse to go to the annual Grange Dance with Grandpa Luke and Tommy unless they receive a proper apology for Grandpas remarks to Tommy about how a man should handle women

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George gets into a dustup with Grampa over a used vacuum cleaner which George wants to give to Kate as a gift

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: While trapped in a television station in a seemingly impossible situation Max admits that he would like to have spent the rest of his life with the smitten 99 which she takes as a proposal

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: While visiting 99s mother who also doesnt seem to have a name they run into Siegfried who is destroying Americas potato crop Max goes after him in a parody of Snoopy and the Red Baron

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJs truck is hijacked by three beautiful sisters They need BJs rig and his help in order to make a big moonshine run that will raise money for their ailing fathers operation

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur gets help from Mister Ed to get more attention from Carol

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol decides to give her current beau the boot Ed defends a woman whose employer is suing her and Mike is humiliated when Dr Jerome second guesses him

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Masquerading as German workers Hogan and the crew have made elaborate and foolproof plans to blow a German cannon factory sky-high - but their plan backfires when Newkirk winds up being drafted into the German army

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When an important Third Reich official wants to defect Hogan brings him to Stalag 13 - and convinces Col Klink that the fugitive is Adolf Hitler in disguisewho is trying to elude assassins by hiding at the camp

programme.title: Mchale 413
programme.desc: Mchale 413

programme.title: Mchale 231
programme.desc: Mchale 231

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer wins a trip for two to Las Vegas and takes Sergeant Carter with him The Sergeant has no money so he has to rely on Gomer for entertainment but Gomer has set an itinerary which include things like visiting a Rock Museum

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways start disappearing one by one and when the remaining castaways discover that headhunters have not taken them Gilligan begins to think hes a Dr Jeckyll and Mr Hyde and has killed them all

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: A 2500night call girl is shot by her pimp Phil Dick Sargent Meanwhile Dan is falling in love with Pam Priscilla Barnes Unbeknownst to Dan she is one of Phils girls named Satin @5000night Dans running headlong into heartbreak

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: An Egyptologist is killed just before the opening of a stagey exhibit featuring the mummy of an ancient Egyptian prince who legend says is waiting for his princess to join him in death -- and she looks just like Jennifer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Stephanie panics when she discovers shes no longer blossoming It takes Larry Darryl and Darryls sage advice to break her depression George buys blue jeans

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Its Halloween and the townspeople believe the town is about to be invaded by aliens

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: The Major Gunny and Holowachuk are on a court martial-panel who are suppose to decide whether the marine on trial is guilty or not It seems the man deserted his post when he learned that something happened to someone in his family And the Major and Gunny are on opposite sides so its Holowahcuk whos the decider So he spends countless time looking at both sides

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Everybody wants a piece of Gilligan and his newfound riches after he wins a three million dollar bet with Mr Howell

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: In the second season opener the series develops a more supernaturalweird tone as Mitch and Griff investigate a sunken freighter where they fight for their lives against an unknown force and realize that the freighter might have been sunk by a New Guinea sea monster according to a woman they found floating in the ocean near sunken wreckage of her sailboat

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Fuming over Froys departure Matt loses his temper on a dominatrix and her client and packs his bags to return to LA Down two repo men the pressure is on Ronnie and Carlos who interrupt a couple in the middle of their less-than-holy matrimony

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: The team returns from a successful mission in Vegas but theres trouble brewing within the crews ranks Ronnie and Carlos repo from a self-defense instructor who lets his students do his dirty work Matt and Froy confront a delinquent delivery man steeling flowers from graves and Lou and Carlos are left defenseless against gang members with blowtorches Can Lou still keep his cool in the high pressure repo business or will there be repercussions for Matt and Froy that no one saw coming

programme.title: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: A German plot to kidnap Sir Winston Churchill unfolds at the height of World War II

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Uncle Jesse reconvenes the Ridge Raiders when he learns that Boss has misappropriated funds for a senior citizens center to build a strip club But when other members of the Ridge Raiders resort to questionable tactics - such as bombing old moonshine stills - Jesse convinces them there are other ways to protest Boss actions

programme.title: Hercules 221
programme.desc: Hercules 221

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Siobhan falls while rock climbing As the others search for her she dreams that she is on trial for supporting the Taelons Zoor questions whether Sandovals CVI imperative to serve the Taelons has broken down as others are experiencing

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A new more advanced generation of aliens known as the Morthren arrive on Earth Dr Blackwood is saved from a kidnapping by a renegade soldier called John Kincaid After executing the original alien invaders for failing to conquer humanity the Morthren aim to destroy Blackwoods team with a clone of Colonel Ironhorse

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Ann Fisk decides to confront the Swamp Thing that he is in actuality Dr Alec Holland

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: A recent storm in the swamp uncovers a car wreck from ten years agoincluding the married couples ghosts that think only hours have passed

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Whilst he is exploring an asteroid Koenig is taken over by an alien race known as the Kalthon who replace him with an exact double In consequence every action ordered by the fake Koenig is solely for the benefit of the Kalthon and to the detriment of the welfare of the Alphans Helena realizes that something is wrong when Koenig is cold to the touch and needs to convince the other crew members

programme.title: The Wizard of Speed and Time
programme.desc: A Hollywood filmmaker Mike Jittlov makes a short for an evil film studio Unbeknownest to him the producer has placed a bet of 25000 that he wont come up with anything with a use Luckily our film creator gets the help of his friends

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: In the series pilot episode cousins Bo and Luke Duke intercept Hazzard County Sheriff Rosco P Coltranes illegal shipment of slot machines then plan to use the proceeds to donate to the Hazzard County Orphanage in Roscos name to ensure his win in an upcoming election against a corrupt opponent

programme.desc: Young 322

programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mikes old partner returns to town looking for the hit man that killed his son

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF agent Rollin Hand impersonating mobster Frank Wayne has a counter-proposal for the other mob bosses He says hell undergo plastic surgery to look like a different man In comes Cinnamon In reality she is undoing Rollins makeup; she can afford no mistakes because the other mob bosses are watching the entire time Meanwhile a doctor working for the IMF is performing plastic surgery on the real Wayne -- making him to look like Rollin All of this is part of Phelpss plan aimed at getting access to Waynes records But Phelps himself will face an attempted hit before the mission can be concluded

programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Missing in Action 3
programme.desc: Braddock mounts a one-man assault to free his wife and son who are still being held in a Vietnam prison camp

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: The Brian Stanley Interview
programme.desc: The master writer and producer Mr Brian Stanley returns to the Sherard Show to talk about his upcoming film and play

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian and Flora sense Vantus presence again and Gillian also senses a great deal of power Vantu has captured the magic of the world and put it in a pyramid When he delivers Jayce to Saw Boss the power will be his to use without interference

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals a seemingly worthless painting from a home in Rio De Janeiro Matt Trakker calls in the MASK team after learning the painting may contain a secret map to lost Nazi treasure

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK travels to Africa to stop a botched experiment which has created a deadly blue slime consuming everything in its path VENOM learns of the slime and seeks to control it in order to take the world hostage

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.desc: Quimby believes that MAD is behind the theft of several military planes

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
